g.text: [1] Add new competitors — discover then research the new ones
[2] Update specific — re-research selected profiles in full
[3] Update all — re-research every profile in full
[4] Diff specific — refresh stale sections for selected profiles
[5] Diff all — refresh stale sections across the full workspace
[6] Re-run failed — retry sections marked failed
[7] Full pipeline — research → verify → enrich → index → themes → synthesize
press a number 1-7 or click an option to run
